xml.etree.ElementTree/register_namespace.name: register_namespace
xml.etree.ElementTree/register_namespace.description: Registers a namespace prefix. The registry is global, and any existing mapping for either the given prefix or the namespace URI will be removed. prefix is a namespace prefix. uri is a namespace uri. Tags and attributes in this namespace will be serialized with the given prefix, if at all possible. Added in version 3.2.

info.excerpt: Registers a namespace prefix. The registry is global, and any existing mapping for either the given prefix or the namespace URI will be removed. prefix is a namespace prefix. uri is a namespace uri. T...

xml.etree.ElementTree/XMLPullParser/read.name: read_events
xml.etree.ElementTree/XMLPullParser/read.description: Return an iterator over the events which have been encountered in the data fed to the parser. The iterator yields (event, elem) pairs, where event is a string representing the type of event (e.g. "end") and elem is the encountered Element object, or other context value as follows. start, end: the current Element. comment, pi: the current comment / processing instruction start-ns: a tuple (prefix, uri) naming the declared namespace mapping. end-ns: None (this may change in a future version) Ev...

xml.etree.ElementTree/Element/remove.name: remove
xml.etree.ElementTree/Element/remove.description: Removes subelement from the element. Unlike the find* methods this method compares elements based on the instance identity, not on tag value or contents.

info.excerpt: Removes subelement from the element. Unlike the find* methods this method compares elements based on the instance identity, not on tag value or contents.
